description:
The table defines a single Output Class, likely within a Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) Land Use / Land Cover (LULC) classification system, specifying its properties and rule-based condition.

| Rank | Class Code | Name | Ruleset | Colour | Show in Map |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1. | 1 | FL Transitional woodland | cov("LCC-woody-vegetation", 5) >= 30 | [Empty checkbox for colour selection] | [Toggle switch: ON] |

The 'Class Code', 'Name', and 'Ruleset' columns are marked as mandatory fields. The 'Ruleset' defines the condition for applying the class: the coverage of 'LCC-woody-vegetation' with barcode 5 must be greater than or equal to 30%. The 'Show in Map' column indicates with an active toggle switch that this Output Class is configured to be visible on a map.
